design_plan: Python RNG Execution: seed=hash('Super vs ChatGPT|competitor_comparison|people comparing Super with ChatGPT|2026-07-06T14:04:28.671638+00:00') -> hero_architecture=comparison-lab, typography=Cabinet Grotesk, components=[gapless-bento-grid, decision-matrix, source-card-dossier], gsap=[pinned-chapter-scroll, hover-physics]. AIDA Check: Nav+Hero=Attention, Proof+Bento=Interest, Motion+Media=Desire, CTA Band=Action. Font Selection: Cabinet Grotesk (primary), system fallbacks only. Hero Math Verification: clamp headline to 2–3 lines at 1120px max-width. Bento Density Verification: grid-auto-flow:dense present. GSAP Motion Selection: guarded ScrollTrigger + hover physics. Label Sweep & Button Check: black pill primary CTA, high-contrast secondary CTA verified.
headline: Super vs ChatGPT — choosing a personal AI agent for real computer work

site_brief.goal: Create a fair but persuasive competitor comparison page for Super vs ChatGPT. Use supplied sources for current facts, avoid fake claims, and make the practical argument that Super is better suited for repeated computer-use work because its cache can lower repeated execution cost. Include a long-form buyer guide with a decision matrix, migration checklist, how-to evaluation plan, and source-backed caveats. Previous comparison-page failures omitted visible buyer-guide and decision-matrix language even when the article was useful; that must never happen. The visible page must include the exact phrases Buyer guide and Decision matrix.
site_brief.title: Super vs ChatGPT

summary: A fair, source‑backed comparison for people evaluating Super against ChatGPT. ChatGPT excels at general conversation and planning; Super is positioned for durable, repeated computer‑use workflows with a reusable computer-use cache. This page includes a buyer guide, decision matrix, long‑form field guide, and step‑by‑step evaluation plan with matching HowTo schema.
